code:
import io
import string
import list

fn contains_str(_ items: List<String>, _ target: String) -> Bool
  mut found = false
  for item in items
    if item == target
      found = true
    end
  end
  found
end

fn count_str(_ items: List<String>, _ target: String) -> Int
  mut count = 0
  for item in items
    if item == target
      count = count + 1
    end
  end
  count
end

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(input)

  mut unique: List<String> = []
  for token in tokens
    if not contains_str(unique, token)
      unique = list.push(unique, token)
    end
  end

  mut best_token = ""
  mut best_count = 0

  for tok in unique
    let cnt = count_str(tokens, tok)
    if cnt > best_count
      best_token = tok
      best_count = cnt
    end
  end

  print("top=#{best_token}=#{best_count}")
  Ok(())
end
